thi13:1.0.252: p_19Th2_330"Kāḷakā bhamaravaṇṇasādisā,Vellitaggā mama muddhajā ahuṁ;Te jarāya sāṇavākasādisā,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.253: p_19Th2_331Vāsitova surabhī karaṇḍako,Pupphapūramamauttamaṅgajo;Taṁ jarāyatha salomagandhikaṁ,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.254: p_19Th2_332Kānanaṁva sahitaṁ suropitaṁ,Kocchasūcivicitaggasobhitaṁ;Taṁ jarāya viralaṁ tahiṁ tahiṁ,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.255: p_19Th2_333Kaṇhakhandhakasuvaṇṇamaṇḍitaṁ,Sobhate suveṇīhilaṅkataṁ;Taṁ jarāya khalitaṁ siraṁ kataṁ,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.256: p_19Th2_334Cittakārasukatāva lekhikā,Sobhare su bhamukā pure mama;Tā jarāya valibhippalambitā,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.257: p_19Th2_335Bhassarā surucirā yathā maṇī,Nettahesumabhinīlamāyatā;Te jarāyabhihatā na sobhare,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.258: p_19Th2_336Saṇhatuṅgasadisī ca nāsikā,Sobhate su abhiyobbanaṁ pati;Sā jarāya upakūlitā viya,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.259: p_19Th2_337Kaṅkaṇaṁva sukataṁ suniṭṭhitaṁ,Sobhare su mama kaṇṇapāḷiyo;Tā jarāya valibhippalambitā,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.260: p_19Th2_338Pattalīmakulavaṇṇasādisā,Sobhare su dantā pure mama;Te jarāyakhaṇḍitā cāsitā,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.261: p_19Th2_339Kānanamhi vanasaṇḍacārinī,Kokilāva madhuraṁ nikūjihaṁ;Taṁ jarāya khalitaṁ tahiṁ tahiṁ,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.262: p_19Th2_340Saṇhakamburiva suppamajjitā,Sobhate su gīvā pure mama;Sā jarāyabhaggāvināmitā,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.263: p_19Th2_341Vaṭṭapalighasadisopamā ubho,Sobhare su bāhā pure mama;Tā jarāyayatha pāṭalibbalitā,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.264: p_19Th2_342Saṇhamuddikasuvaṇṇamaṇḍitā,Sobhare su hatthā pure mama;Te jarāya yathā mūlamūlikā,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.265: p_19Th2_343Pīnavaṭṭasahituggatā ubho,Sobharesu thanakā pure mama;Thevikīva lambanti nodakā,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.266: p_19Th2_344Kañcanassa phalakaṁva sammaṭṭhaṁ,Sobhate su kāyo pure mama;So valīhi sukhumāhi otato,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.267: p_19Th2_345Nāgabhogasadisopamā ubho,Sobhare su ūrū pure mama;Te jarāya yathā veḷunāḷiyo,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.268: p_19Th2_346Saṇhanūpurasuvaṇṇamaṇḍitā,Sobhare su jaṅghā pure mama;Tā jarāya tiladaṇḍakāriva,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.269: p_19Th2_347Tūlapuṇṇasadisopamā ubho,Sobhare su pādā pure mama;Te jarāya phuṭitā valīmatā,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā.
thi13:1.0.270: p_19Th2_348Ediso ahu ayaṁ samussayo,Jajjaro bahudukkhānamālayo;Sopalepapatito jarāgharo,Saccavādivacanaṁ anaññathā".
thi13:1.0.272: p_19Th2_351Vipulaṁ annañca pānañca,samaṇānaṁpaveccasi;Rohinī dāni pucchāmi,kena te samaṇā piyā.
thi13:1.0.273: p_19Th2_352Akammakāmā alasā,paradattūpajīvino;Āsaṁsukā sādukāmā,kena te samaṇā piyā".
thi13:1.0.274: p_19Th2_353"Cirassaṁ vata maṁ tāta,samaṇānaṁ paripucchasi;Tesaṁ te kittayissāmi,paññāsīlaparakkamaṁ.
thi13:1.0.275: p_19Th2_354Kammakāmā analasā,kammaseṭṭhassa kārakā;Rāgaṁ dosaṁ pajahanti,tena me samaṇā piyā.
thi13:1.0.276: p_19Th2_355Tīṇi pāpassa mūlāni,dhunanti sucikārino;Sabbaṁ pāpaṁ pahīnesaṁ,tena me samaṇā piyā.
thi13:1.0.277: p_19Th2_356Kāyakammaṁ suci nesaṁ,vacīkammañca tādisaṁ;Manokammaṁ suci nesaṁ,tena me samaṇā piyā.
thi13:1.0.278: p_19Th2_357Vimalā saṅkhamuttāva,suddhā santarabāhirā;Puṇṇāsukkāna dhammānaṁ,tena me samaṇā piyā.
thi13:1.0.279: p_19Th2_358Bahussutā dhammadharā,ariyā dhammajīvino;Atthaṁ dhammañca desenti,tena me samaṇā piyā.
thi13:1.0.280: p_19Th2_359Bahussutā dhammadharā,ariyā dhammajīvino;Ekaggacittā satimanto,tena me samaṇā piyā.
thi13:1.0.281: p_19Th2_360Dūraṅgamā satimanto,mantabhāṇī anuddhatā;Dukkhassantaṁ pajānanti,tena me samaṇā piyā.
thi13:1.0.282: p_19Th2_361Yasmā gāmā pakkamanti,na vilokenti kiñcanaṁ;Anapekkhāva gacchanti,tena me samaṇā piyā.
thi13:1.0.283: p_19Th2_362Na te saṁ koṭṭhe openti,na kumbhiṁ na khaḷopiyaṁ;Pariniṭṭhitamesānā,tena me samaṇā piyā.
thi13:1.0.284: p_19Th2_363Na te hiraññaṁ gaṇhanti,na suvaṇṇaṁ na rūpiyaṁ;Paccuppannena yāpenti,tena me samaṇā piyā.
thi13:1.0.285: p_19Th2_364Nānākulā pabbajitā,nānājanapadehi ca;Aññamaññaṁpiyāyanti,tena me samaṇā piyā".
thi13:1.0.286: p_19Th2_365"Atthāya vata no bhoti,kule jātāsi rohinī;Saddhā buddhe ca dhamme ca,saṁghe ca tibbagāravā.
thi13:1.0.287: p_19Th2_366Tuvaṁ hetaṁ pajānāsi,puññakkhettaṁ anuttaraṁ;Amhampi ete samaṇā,paṭigaṇhanti dakkhiṇaṁ.
thi13:1.0.288: p_19Th2_367Patiṭṭhito hettha yañño,vipulo no bhavissati";"Sace bhāyasi dukkhassa,sace te dukkhamappiyaṁ.
thi13:1.0.289: p_19Th2_368Upehi saraṇaṁ buddhaṁ,dhammaṁ saṁghañca tādinaṁ;Samādiyāhi sīlāni,taṁ te atthāya hehiti".
thi13:1.0.290: p_19Th2_369"Upemi saraṇaṁ buddhaṁ,dhammaṁ saṁghañca tādinaṁ;Samādiyāmi sīlāni,taṁ me atthāya hehiti.
thi13:1.0.291: p_19Th2_370Brahmabandhu pure āsiṁ,so idānimhi brāhmaṇo;Tevijjo sottiyo camhi,vedagū camhi nhātako".
thi13:1.0.292: p_19Th2_372"Laṭṭhihattho pure āsi,so dāni migaluddako;Āsāya palipā ghorā,nāsakkhi pārametave.
thi13:1.0.293: p_19Th2_373Sumattaṁ maṁ maññamānā,cāpā puttamatosayi;Cāpāya bandhanaṁ chetvā,pabbajissaṁ punopahaṁ".
thi13:1.0.294: p_19Th2_374"Mā me kujjhi mahāvīra,mā me kujjhi mahāmuni;Na hi kodhaparetassa,suddhi atthi kuto tapo".
thi13:1.0.296: p_19Th2_376"Ehi kāḷa nivattassu,bhuñja kāme yathā pure;Ahañca te vasīkatā,ye ca me santi ñātakā".
thi13:1.0.297: p_19Th2_377"Etto cāpe catubbhāgaṁ,yathā bhāsasi tvañca me;Tayi rattassa posassa,uḷāraṁ vata taṁ siyā".
thi13:1.0.300: p_19Th2_380"Sākuntikovasakuṇiṁ,yathā bandhitumicchati;Āharimena rūpena,na maṁ tvaṁ bādhayissasi".
thi13:1.0.301: p_19Th2_381"Imañca me puttaphalaṁ,kāḷa uppāditaṁ tayā;Taṁ maṁ puttavatiṁ santiṁ,kassa ohāya gacchasi".
thi13:1.0.302: p_19Th2_382"Jahanti putte sappaññā,tato ñātī tato dhanaṁ;Pabbajanti mahāvīrā,nāgo chetvāva bandhanaṁ".
thi13:1.0.303: p_19Th2_383"Idāni te imaṁ puttaṁ,Daṇḍena churikāya vā;Bhūmiyaṁ vānisumbhissaṁ,Puttasokā na gacchasi".
thi13:1.0.304: p_19Th2_384"Sace puttaṁ siṅgālānaṁ,kukkurānaṁ padāhisi;Na maṁ puttakatte jammi,punarāvattayissasi".
thi13:1.0.305: p_19Th2_385"Handa kho dāni bhaddante,kuhiṁ kāḷa gamissasi;Katamaṁ gāmanigamaṁ,nagaraṁ rājadhāniyo".
thi13:1.0.306: p_19Th2_386"Ahumha pubbe gaṇino,Assamaṇā samaṇamānino;Gāmena gāmaṁ vicarimha,Nagare rājadhāniyo.
thi13:1.0.307: p_19Th2_387Eso hi bhagavā buddho,nadiṁ nerañjaraṁ pati;Sabbadukkhappahānāya,dhammaṁ deseti pāṇinaṁ;Tassāhaṁ santikaṁ gacchaṁ,so me satthā bhavissati".
thi13:1.0.308: p_19Th2_388"Vandanaṁ dāni vajjāsi,lokanāthaṁ anuttaraṁ;Padakkhiṇañca katvāna,ādiseyyāsi dakkhiṇaṁ".
thi13:1.0.309: p_19Th2_389"Etaṁ kho labbhamamhehi,yathā bhāsasi tvañca me;Vandanaṁ dāni te vajjaṁ,lokanāthaṁ anuttaraṁ;Padakkhiṇañca katvāna,ādisissāmi dakkhiṇaṁ".
thi13:1.0.310: p_19Th2_390Tato ca kāḷo pakkāmi,nadiṁ nerañjaraṁ pati;So addasāsi sambuddhaṁ,desentaṁ amataṁ padaṁ.
thi13:1.0.311: p_19Th2_391Dukkhaṁ dukkhasamuppādaṁ,dukkhassa ca atikkamaṁ;Ariyaṁ caṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ,dukkhūpasamagāminaṁ.
thi13:1.0.312: p_19Th2_392Tassa pādāni vanditvā,Katvānanaṁpadakkhiṇaṁ;Cāpāya ādisitvāna,Pabbajiṁ anagāriyaṁ;Tisso vijjā anuppattā,Kataṁ buddhassa sāsanaṁ.
thi13:1.0.313: p_19Th2_394"Petāni bhoti puttāni,khādamānā tuvaṁ pure;Tuvaṁ divā ca ratto ca,atīva paritappasi.
thi13:1.0.314: p_19Th2_395Sājja sabbāni khāditvā,sataputtānibrāhmaṇī;Vāseṭṭhi kena vaṇṇena,na bāḷhaṁ paritappasi".
thi13:1.0.315: p_19Th2_396"Bahūni puttasatāni,ñātisaṅghasatāni ca;Khāditāni atītaṁse,mama tuyhañca brāhmaṇa.
thi13:1.0.316: p_19Th2_397Sāhaṁ nissaraṇaṁ ñatvā,jātiyā maraṇassa ca;Na socāmi na rodāmi,na cāpi paritappayiṁ".
thi13:1.0.317: p_19Th2_398"Abbhutaṁ vata vāseṭṭhi,vācaṁ bhāsasi edisiṁ;Kassa tvaṁ dhammamaññāya,giraṁbhāsasi edisiṁ".
thi13:1.0.318: p_19Th2_399"Esa brāhmaṇa sambuddho,nagaraṁ mithilaṁ pati;Sabbadukkhappahānāya,dhammaṁ desesi pāṇinaṁ.
thi13:1.0.320: p_19Th2_401"So ahampi gamissāmi,nagaraṁ mithilaṁ pati;Appeva maṁ so bhagavā,sabbadukkhā pamocaye".
thi13:1.0.321: p_19Th2_402Addasa brāhmaṇo buddhaṁ,vippamuttaṁ nirūpadhiṁ;Svassa dhammamadesesi,muni dukkhassa pāragū.
thi13:1.0.322: p_19Th2_403Dukkhaṁ dukkhasamuppādaṁ,dukkhassa ca atikkamaṁ;Ariyaṁ caṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ,dukkhūpasamagāminaṁ.
thi13:1.0.323: p_19Th2_404Tattha viññātasaddhammo,pabbajjaṁ samarocayi;Sujāto tīhi rattīhi,tisso vijjā aphassayi.
thi13:1.0.324: p_19Th2_405"Ehi sārathi gacchāhi,rathaṁ niyyādayāhimaṁ;Ārogyaṁ brāhmaṇiṁvajja,‘pabbajidāni brāhmaṇo;Sujāto tīhi rattīhi,tisso vijjā aphassayi’".
thi13:1.0.325: p_19Th2_406Tato ca rathamādāya,sahassañcāpi sārathi;Ārogyaṁ brāhmaṇiṁvoca,"pabbaji dāni brāhmaṇo;Sujāto tīhi rattīhi,tisso vijjā aphassayi".
thi13:1.0.326: p_19Th2_407"Etañcāhaṁ assarathaṁ,sahassañcāpi sārathi;Tevijjaṁ brāhmaṇaṁsutvā,puṇṇapattaṁ dadāmi te".
thi13:1.0.328: p_19Th2_409"Hatthī gavassaṁ maṇikuṇḍalañca,Phītañcimaṁ gahavibhavaṁ pahāya;Pitā pabbajito tuyhaṁ,Bhuñja bhogāni sundarī;Tuvaṁ dāyādikā kule".
thi13:1.0.329: p_19Th2_410"Hatthī gavassaṁ maṇikuṇḍalañca,Rammaṁ cimaṁ gahavibhavaṁ pahāya;Pitā pabbajito mayhaṁ,Puttasokena aṭṭito;Ahampi pabbajissāmi,Bhātusokena aṭṭitā".
thi13:1.0.330: p_19Th2_411"So te ijjhatu saṅkappo,yaṁ tvaṁ patthesi sundarī;Uttiṭṭhapiṇḍo uñcho ca,paṁsukūlañca cīvaraṁ;Etāni abhisambhontī,paraloke anāsavā".
thi13:1.0.331: p_19Th2_412"Sikkhamānāya me ayye,dibbacakkhu visodhitaṁ;Pubbenivāsaṁ jānāmi,yattha me vusitaṁ pure.
thi13:1.0.332: p_19Th2_413Tuvaṁ nissāya kalyāṇi,theri saṁghassa sobhane;Tisso vijjā anuppattā,kataṁ buddhassa sāsanaṁ.
thi13:1.0.333: p_19Th2_414Anujānāhi me ayye,icche sāvatthi gantave;Sīhanādaṁ nadissāmi,buddhaseṭṭhassa santike".
thi13:1.0.336: p_19Th2_417Bārāṇasito nikkhamma,tava santikamāgatā;Sāvikā te mahāvīra,pāde vandati sundarī.
thi13:1.0.337: p_19Th2_418Tuvaṁ buddho tuvaṁ satthā,tuyhaṁ dhītāmhi brāhmaṇa;Orasā mukhato jātā,katakiccā anāsavā".
thi13:1.0.338: p_19Th2_419"Tassā te svāgataṁ bhadde,tatote adurāgataṁ;Evañhi dantā āyanti,satthu pādāni vandikā;Vītarāgā visaṁyuttā,katakiccā anāsavā".
thi13:1.0.339: p_19Th2_421"Daharāhaṁ suddhavasanā,yaṁ pure dhammamassuṇiṁ;Tassā me appamattāya,saccābhisamayo ahu.
thi13:1.0.344: p_19Th2_426Rajataṁ jātarūpaṁ vā,na bodhāya na santiyā;Netaṁ samaṇasāruppaṁ,na etaṁ ariyaddhanaṁ.
thi13:1.0.345: p_19Th2_427Lobhanaṁ madanañcetaṁ,mohanaṁ rajavaḍḍhanaṁ;Sāsaṅkaṁ bahuāyāsaṁ,natthi cettha dhuvaṁ ṭhiti.
thi13:1.0.346: p_19Th2_428Ettha rattā pamattā ca,saṁkiliṭṭhamanā narā;Aññamaññena byāruddhā,puthu kubbanti medhagaṁ.
thi13:1.0.347: p_19Th2_429Vadho bandho parikleso,jāni sokapariddavo;Kāmesu adhipannānaṁ,dissate byasanaṁ bahuṁ.
thi13:1.0.348: p_19Th2_430Taṁ maṁ ñātī amittāva,kiṁ vo kāmesu yuñjatha;Jānātha maṁ pabbajitaṁ,kāmesu bhayadassiniṁ.
thi13:1.0.349: p_19Th2_431Na hiraññasuvaṇṇena,parikkhīyanti āsavā;Amittā vadhakā kāmā,sapattā sallabandhanā.
thi13:1.0.350: p_19Th2_432Taṁ maṁ ñātī amittāva,kiṁ vo kāmesu yuñjatha;Jānātha maṁ pabbajitaṁ,muṇḍaṁ saṅghāṭipārutaṁ.
thi13:1.0.351: p_19Th2_433Uttiṭṭhapiṇḍo uñcho ca,paṁsukūlañca cīvaraṁ;Etaṁ kho mama sāruppaṁ,anagārūpanissayo.
thi13:1.0.352: p_19Th2_434Vantā mahesīhi kāmā,ye dibbā ye ca mānusā;Khemaṭṭhāne vimuttā te,pattā te acalaṁ sukhaṁ.
thi13:1.0.353: p_19Th2_435Māhaṁ kāmehi saṅgacchiṁ,yesu tāṇaṁ na vijjati;Amittā vadhakā kāmā,aggikkhandhūpamā dukhā.
thi13:1.0.354: p_19Th2_436Paripantho esa bhayo,savighāto sakaṇṭako;Gedho suvisamoceso,mahanto mohanāmukho.
thi13:1.0.355: p_19Th2_437Upasaggo bhīmarūpo,kāmā sappasirūpamā;Ye bālā abhinandanti,andhabhūtā puthujjanā.
thi13:1.0.356: p_19Th2_438Kāmapaṅkena sattā hi,bahū loke aviddasū;Pariyantaṁ na jānanti,jātiyā maraṇassa ca.
thi13:1.0.357: p_19Th2_439Duggatigamanaṁ maggaṁ,manussā kāmahetukaṁ;Bahuṁ ve paṭipajjanti,attano rogamāvahaṁ.
thi13:1.0.361: p_19Th2_443Sāhaṁ etādisaṁ katvā,byasanaṁ kāmahetukaṁ;Na taṁ paccāgamissāmi,nibbānābhiratā sadā.
thi13:1.0.363: p_19Th2_445Asokaṁ virajaṁ khemaṁ,ariyaṭṭhaṅgikaṁ ujuṁ;Taṁ maggaṁ anugacchāmi,yena tiṇṇā mahesino".
thi13:1.0.364: p_19Th2_446"Imaṁ passatha dhammaṭṭhaṁ,subhaṁ kammāradhītaraṁ;Anejaṁ upasampajja,rukkhamūlamhi jhāyati.
thi13:1.0.367: p_19Th2_449Taṁ sakko devasaṅghena,upasaṅkamma iddhiyā;Namassati bhūtapati,subhaṁ kammāradhītaranti.
